events.title: Meta launches Pocket, an AI app that can generate games with simple prompts
Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
events.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.
